name: Coffee, Expresso or Cappuccino
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill machine with cold water up to the level for the desired number of cups.
2. Do not cover the safety valve hole with water.
3. Fill brew basket to the rim with coffee. For 9 cups, remove the reducer from the brew basket and fill the entire basket. For 3 or 6 cups, use the reducer as follows: long stem facing down for 3 cups; short stem facing down for 6 cups.
4. Clean off excess grounds from the brew basket rim and o-ring.
5. Close and tighten the knob as far as possible.
6. Close the steam valve.
7. Place a carafe under the steam valve to catch coffee.
8. Coffee will begin to drip out slowly after 3-10 minutes, initially appearing very dark. As brewing continues, the stream will become strong and steady, and the coffee will lighten in color.
9. When the coffee stops dripping and becomes noisy, close the coffee valve and remove the carafe.
If making cappuccino:
1. Close the steam valve to let steam build up.
2. Put cream or milk in a cup.
3. Open the steam valve to froth the milk.
